name: python3-flask-login
title: python3-flask-login
summary: user session management for Flask -- Python 3 module
description:
user session management for Flask -- Python 3 module
Flask-Login provides user session management for Flask. It handles the
common tasks of logging in, logging out, and remembering your users'
sessions over extended periods of time.
.
Flask-Login is not bound to any particular database system or permissions
model. The only requirement is that your user objects implement a few
methods, and that you provide a callback to the extension capable of
loading users from their ID.
.
This package provides the Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-login because user session management for Flask -- Python 3 module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-login as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-login with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-login --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
